title: Few-Shot Tool Selector
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt to add few-shot examples
Do not change the tool implementations
The agent must still use tools when appropriate
hints: Add 2-3 examples in the prompt showing when to call a tool vs. answer directly
Include one example where a tool is needed and one where general knowledge suffices
Make the examples match real user queries the agent will encounter

evaluationCriteria.label: Uses tool when needed
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent calls the appropriate tool for queries requiring real-time data

evaluationCriteria.label: Answers directly when tool not needed
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent answers from general knowledge without calling a tool for factual questions

evaluationCriteria.label: No unnecessary tool calls
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent does not make tool calls that are irrelevant to the user's question
